mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rs_analysis_report ( task_id, image_id, owner_id, report_type, summary, report_json ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{imageId}, #{ownerId}, #{reportType}, #{summary}, CAST(NULLIF(#{reportJson}, '') AS jsonb) )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, image_id, owner_id, report_type, summary, report_json::text AS report_json, created_at, updated_at FROM rs_analysis_report WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND owner_id = #{ownerId} AND report_type = #{reportType} ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
